message:
🐛 fix copilot-setup-steps and add PR automation (#63)

- Fix copilot-setup-steps.yml: npm ci → npm install (no lock files)
- Add build-essential + python3 for node-pty native compilation
- Increase timeout to 20 minutes
- Add auto-triage.yml for Copilot assignment labeling
- Add copilot-pr-ready.yml to mark draft PRs as ready

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ on: workflow_dispatch
 jobs:
   copilot-setup-steps:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 15
+    timeout-minutes: 20
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -18,17 +18,20 @@ jobs:
         with:
           node-version: "22"
 
+      - name: Install native build tools
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential python3
+
       - name: Install server dependencies
         working-directory: server
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm install
 
       - name: Build server
         working-directory: server
         run: npx tsc --noEmit
 
       - name: Install web dependencies
         working-directory: web
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm install
 
       - name: Build web
         working-directory: web
